name: split-button
title: Split Button
description: Fluent 2-styled split button with shadcn-style APIs. Three composable parts (SplitButton, SplitButtonAction, SplitButtonTrigger) join a primary command to an icon-only chevron trigger, sharing variant/size via context and styled through buttonVariants. The chevron composes with the kit DropdownMenu via Base UI's render prop.
author: graundtech <https://github.com/graundtech/fluent2-react-kit>
